issue_summary: Fix possible NPEs in some file filters when paths have no parent or no elements.
javadoc_before:
/** * Checks if one string ends with another using the case-sensitivity rule. *

* This method mimics {@link String#endsWith} but takes case-sensitivity * into account. *

* * @param str the string to check, not null * @param end the end to compare against, not null * @return true if equal using the case rules * @throws NullPointerException if either string is null */
javadoc_after:
/** * Checks if one string ends with another using the case-sensitivity rule. *

* This method mimics {@link String#endsWith} but takes case-sensitivity * into account. *

* * @param str the string to check * @param end the end to compare against * @return true if equal using the case rules, false if either input is null */
